heading: Available Search Tiers
body:
Atlas provides various [Search Tier](select-tiers-for-search-nodes) for Search Nodes deployed on AWS (Amazon Web Services).The following table lists the search tiers available for each class of
hardware (low-CPU, high-CPU, storage-optimized), with default RAM and
storage measured in gibibytes (GiB):**Americas:**Americas**Low-cpu:**Low-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S30           | 8 GiB       | 49 GiB          | 1    |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 98 GiB          | 2    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 198 GiB         | 4    |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 396 GiB         | 8    |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 796 GiB         | 16   |
| S90           | 256 GiB     | 1592 GiB        | 32   |
| S100          | 384 GiB     | 2387 GiB        | 48   |
| S110          | 512 GiB     | 3185 GiB        | 64   |**High-cpu:**High-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S20           | 4 GiB       | 98 GiB          | 2    |
| S30           | 8 GiB       | 198 GiB         | 4    |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 396 GiB         | 8    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 796 GiB         | 16   |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 1592 GiB        | 32   |
| S70           | 96 GiB      | 2387 GiB        | 48   |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 3815 GiB        | 64   |**Storage-optimized:**Storage-Optimized| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 392 GiB         | 2    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 785 GiB         | 4    |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 1571 GiB        | 8    |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 3143 GiB        | 16   |
| S90           | 256 GiB     | 6286 GiB        | 32   |**Asia-pacific:**Asia Pacific**Low-cpu:**Low-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S30           | 8 GiB       | 53 GiB          | 1    |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 106 GiB         | 2    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 213 GiB         | 4    |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 426 GiB         | 8    |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 855 GiB         | 16   |
| S90           | 256 GiB     | 1710 GiB        | 32   |
| S100          | 384 GiB     | 2564 GiB        | 48   |
| S110          | 512 GiB     | 3420 GiB        | 64   |**High-cpu:**High-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S20           | 4 GiB       | 106 GiB         | 2    |
| S30           | 8 GiB       | 213 GiB         | 4    |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 426 GiB         | 8    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 855 GiB         | 16   |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 1710 GiB        | 32   |
| S70           | 96 GiB      | 2564 GiB        | 48   |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 3420 GiB        | 64   |**Europe:**Europe**Low-cpu:**Low-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | vCPU |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | ---- |
| S30           | 8 GiB       | 53 GiB          | 1    |
| S40           | 16 GiB      | 106 GiB         | 2    |
| S50           | 32 GiB      | 213 GiB         | 4    |
| S60           | 64 GiB      | 426 GiB         | 8    |
| S80           | 128 GiB     | 855 GiB         | 16   |
| S90           | 256 GiB     | 1710 GiB        | 32   |
| S100          | 384 GiB     | 2564 GiB        | 48   |
| S110          | 512 GiB     | 3420 GiB        | 64   |**High-cpu:**High-CPU| Instance Size | Default RAM | Default Storage | Location |
| ------------- | ----------- | --------------- | -------- |
| S20           | 4 GiB       | 106 GiB         | 2        |
